name: northstar-tiktok-connector
description: Secure TikTok Sandbox OAuth connector for NorthStar Creator.

scripts.check: node -c api/session.js && node -c api/health/database.js && node -c api/auth/tiktok/start.js && node -c api/auth/tiktok/callback.js && node -c api/auth/tiktok/disconnect.js && node -c api/tiktok/me.js && node -c api/tiktok/videos.js && node -c api/tiktok/sync.js && node -c lib/cors.js && node -c lib/crypto.js && node -c lib/session.js && node -c lib/tiktok.js && node -c lib/token-store.js && node -c lib/live-import-policy.js && node -c lib/db.js && node -c lib/sync-repository.js && node -c lib/tiktok-sync-persistence.js && node -c tests/sandbox-config.test.js && node -c tests/database-foundation.test.js && node -c tests/database-health.test.js && node -c tests/tiktok-sync-persistence.test.js
scripts.test: node tests/sandbox-config.test.js && node tests/database-foundation.test.js && node tests/database-health.test.js && node tests/tiktok-sync-persistence.test.js
